title: Christmas Wrapping Paper Matching Christmas Tags and Raffia Ribbon Set 8 Metres Wrapping Paper - 4 x 2M rolls (Traditional Red)
features: Elevate your holiday gifting experience with our complete Christmas wrapping paper set, meticulously designed to bring joy and elegance to your festive celebrations.

This comprehensive set includes four rolls of high-quality wrapping paper, each measuring an impressive 2 metres in length and 70 cm in width, ensuring ample coverage for gifts of all shapes and sizes.
Complementing the wrapping paper are eight beautifully coordinated gift tags, allowing you to personalize each present with heartfelt messages.
Additionally, the set features two rolls of raffia ribbon, each measuring 2 metres, perfect for adding a charming finishing touch to your wrapped gifts.

With its vibrant and festive designs, this wrapping paper set not only enhances the aesthetic appeal of your presents but also embodies the spirit of Christmas, making it an essential addition to your holiday preparations.
Furthermore, this product is entirely plastic-free, including both the wrapping materials and packaging, reflecting a commitment to sustainability while you celebrate the holidays.
